H1_pole_orders.interpretation: Pole orders in ẑ(z), not vector-space multiplicities

H2_6phi_under_D10.interpretation: +6φ space splits under D_10 if conditions hold; otherwise σ' twist isn't compatible with this eigenspace

H3_lambda_neg2_trivial_subspace.interpretation: 12-dim Z/5-trivial within λ=-2 splits under σ' as (n_plus + n_minus) — looking for {1,1,5,5} structure if there's additional symmetry

overall_conclusion: {1,1,5,5} are POLE ORDERS in ẑ(z), totaling 240 = |E_8| poles. Not graph-spectral S_5 multiplicities on V_600 or 120-cell.
